sys_update_version.name: sys_transform_script_9fe1239dc3f33614c134bf12b40131b4
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_transform_script"><sys_transform_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><map display_value="Hardware Location">a24dcd94c37bf210c134bf12b401310f</map><order>150</order><script><![CDATA[(function runTransformScript(source, map, log, target /*undefined onStart*/ ) {

    // Populate a location Reference for all import set rows
	// based on the numeric location code being mapped to one
	// of our Locations
    var locationMap = {};
    locationMap["54"] = "100 South Charles Street, Baltimore,MD";
    locationMap["752"] = "10065 East Harvard Avenue, Denver,CO";
    locationMap["808"] = "808 Glen Eagles Court #1, Baltimore,MD";
    locationMap["601"] = "601 College Street, Clarksville,TN";
    
    var gr_is_row = new GlideRecord("x_42999_decision_0_hardware_location");
    gr_is_row.addQuery("sys_import_set", import_set.sys_id);
    gr_is_row.query();
    while (gr_is_row.hasNext()) {
        gr_is_row.next();
		var locationCode = gr_is_row.getValue("u_location") || "";
		if(locationCode && locationMap[locationCode]) {
			var gr_location = new GlideRecord("cmn_location");
			gr_location.addQuery("name","=", locationMap[locationCode]);
			gr_location.setLimit(1);
			gr_location.query();
			if(gr_location.next()) {
				gr_is_row.setValue("u_location_ref", gr_location.getValue("sys_id"));
                gr_is_row.update();
			}
		}
    }

})(source, map, log, target);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_transform_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-22 16:48:33</sys_created_on><sys_id>9fe1239dc3f33614c134bf12b40131b4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>onStart</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Decision Table Transforms" source="x_42999_decision_0">42764918c33bf210c134bf12b401311a</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Decision Table Transforms">42764918c33bf210c134bf12b401311a</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_transform_script_9fe1239dc3f33614c134bf12b40131b4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-22 17:10:52</sys_updated_on><when>onStart</when></sys_transform_script></record_update>
